deploy_undeploy_and_roll_back_workflows_: Deploy, undeploy, and roll back workflows in the current workspace. Promote a previous deployment version to live, list every version, or fetch the deployed workflow state for a specific version.
deployment_version_number_promote_and_ge: Deployment version number (Promote and Get Version Details operations)
deployment_versions_newest_first_id_vers: Deployment versions, newest first (id, version, name, description, isActive, createdAt, createdBy, deployedByName)
iso_8601_timestamp_of_the_active_deploym: ISO 8601 timestamp of the active deployment; null after an undeploy
non_fatal_warnings_e_g_trigger_or_schedu: Non-fatal warnings (e.g. trigger or schedule sync still in progress)
optional_summary_of_what_changed_in_this: Optional summary of what changed in this version
the_full_workflow_state_snapshot_blocks_: The full workflow state snapshot (blocks, edges, loops, parallels, variables)
whether_the_workflow_is_deployed_after_t: Whether the workflow is deployed after the operation
whether_this_version_is_currently_live: Whether this version is currently live
